text:
is a live action short video directed by Hiroshi Butsuda published by Bandai Namco's YouTube channel on 18 May 2023 https://youtube.com/watch?si=qEYbB7WDJzcF2uI2&v=upQYSSXHv7s . It is part of the Shin Japan Heroes Universe project.

Story

A creature attacks a city. To overcome this, Ultraman, Evangelion Unit-01, Godzilla, and Kamen Rider decide to join forces. They merge to become Shin Universe Robo. Despite the enemy's multiple attacks, it advances in his direction without being stopped, and launches an attack combining his four weapons: Ultraman's Ultra Beam, Unit-01's A.T. Field, Godzilla's Atomic Breath, and Kamen Rider's Rider Kick. The enemy monster disappears in an explosion.

Characters

Shin Universe Robo
Evangelion Test Type-01
Godzilla
Ultraman
Kamen Rider

Staff

Director: Hiroshi Butsuda
Storyboard: Hiroshi Butsuda
Art Directors: Yoshi Matsuura, Shunsuke Hasegawa and Tomoya Tsuruta
Visual Effects Supervisor: Toru Adachi
Sound Designer: Hidetsuna Kuwahara
Music: Yoko Takahashi
Editor: Shokichi Kaneda
Production Company: Tokusatsu Kenkyūjo
Distribution Company: Bandai Namco

Music

The song "Tsumi to Batsu - Inorazaru Mono yo" by Yoko Takahashi was specifically created for this project.
